description: Guru is a knowledge management platform for organizing company knowledge, searching across connected sources, and powering AI-assisted answers and workflows. It lets teams manage cards, folders, profiles, tags, analytics, and related knowledge operations.
summary: Guru exposes a REST API at https://api.getguru.com/api/v1/, an MCP server at https://mcp.api.getguru.com/mcp, and an official npm CLI package (@getguru/cli).
